_comment_target: Action-aware embodiment adapter (use_embodiment_adapter=true + use_action_aware_adaln=true) on the full 802-clip droid_1k train split, FSDP. Layered conditioning: (i) RenderSpatialEncoder (Q) ← cross_attn → action_proj(8-d joint+gripper)(K,V) → DecoupledAdaLNHead → per-channel-gated AdaLN delta; (ii) state-encoder + render-encoder → render_to_adaln + state_to_adaln deltas; (iii) RenderCrossAttnAdapter at blocks 7,15,23,31,39. NOT identity-at-init only because gate_lr_multiplier=10× ramps the zero-init gates fast — model output IS bit-exact vanilla Wan at step 0 (every gate=0).
_action_note: 8-d state (joint_position 7 + gripper 1) z-scored against train-split stats. Aligned 1:1 with camera frames via shared np.linspace indices.
_cache_note: Different cache file from the egowm (no-actions) 17f cache because the actions key changes precompute output. _PRECOMPUTE_CACHE_VERSION=2.
